name: Albany Tennis Club
description: Albany Tennis Club is a place to play pickleball in Albany, OR. There are 8 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Boys & Girls Club Of Albany
description: Boys & Girls Club Of Albany is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Albany, OR. The court surface is wood. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Burkhart Park
description: Burkhart Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Albany, OR. There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Century Park
description: Century Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lebanon, OR. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Eleanor Hackleman Park
description: Come play pickleball at Eleanor Hackleman Park in Albany, OR! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Hackleman Pickleball Courts
description: Hackleman Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Albany, OR. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Lebanon Boys & Girls Club of Greater Santiam
description: Lebanon Boys & Girls Club of Greater Santiam is a place to play pickleball in Lebanon, OR. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Linn-Benton Community College
description: Linn-Benton Community College is a place to play pickleball in Albany, OR. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights and water. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: North Albany Elementary School
description: North Albany Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Albany, OR. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: North Albany Middle School
description: North Albany Middle School is a place to play pickleball in Albany, OR. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Scio High School
description: Scio High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Scio, OR. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.
